subcodes.title: Words spoken in 1912 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: For this is the Radiant Century, the time when deeds must take the place of words. Blessed is that soul which does not attach itself to transient conditions
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @words vs deeds
